description: Anonymized cohort of graduated ventures from a Brazilian university incubator. Each row is one venture at graduation.
source: Original survey conducted with incubator graduates (identifiers removed).

ip.description: Intellectual property registered (patent or software) during incubation OR after graduation (1=yes, 0=no).

hub.description: Post-graduation affiliation with a hub, science/technology park, or innovation space (1=yes, 0=no). Reference category: own premises or rented office.

rev_high.description: High-revenue indicator: 1 if self-reported annual turnover bracket ≥ R$5M–R$10M, 0 otherwise.

team_growth.description: Team size grew after graduation: 1 if current headcount bracket > entry headcount bracket (ordinal 0–3 scale), 0 otherwise.

stage_growth.description: Technology stage advanced: 1 if maturity level at exit > maturity level at entry (scale 1=Ideation, 2=MVP, 3=Business, 4=Scale-up), 0 otherwise.

tech_digital.description: Technology domain indicator. 1=digital/platform/Industry-4.0 (drones, platforms, remote sensing, food-4.0); 0=bio/agri (biocontrol, fertilizers, food innovation, lab analysis, sustainability).

founders.description: Number of founding partners at company inception.

incub_years.description: Incubation duration in years (year of graduation minus year of entry).

stage_in.description: Technology maturity stage at incubation entry (1=lowest, 4=highest).

team_size_in.description: Entry team size bracket. 0 = fewer than 5 employees; 1 = 5–10 employees.

stage_adv.description: Advanced stage at entry indicator: 1 if stage_in > 2 (Business or Scale-up), 0 otherwise. Derived from stage_in.
